nasb.text: Woe to those who call evil good, and good evil; Who substitute darkness for light and light for darkness; Who substitute bitter for sweet and sweet for bitter!

esv.text: Woe to those who call evil good and good evil, who put darkness for light and light for darkness, who put bitter for sweet and sweet for bitter!

cnv.text: 那些稱惡為善，稱善為惡， 以暗為光，以光為暗， 以苦為甜，以甜為苦的人，有禍了！

ccb.text: 那些善恶不分、黑白颠倒、 甜苦不辨的人有祸了！

csbs.text: 祸哉！那些称恶为善、称善为恶， 以黑暗为光、以光为黑暗， 以苦为甜、以甜为苦的人！
